Schematic:SID_Assault_ArtDeco_SR_Crystal.Name: SID_Assault_ArtDeco_SR_Crystal_T04
Schematic:SID_Assault_ArtDeco_SR_Crystal.Description: Assault Weapon: Art Deco.  A versatile assault rifle useful in all types of combat scenarios that is the most accurate when aiming down sights and firing in controlled bursts.

Schematic:SID_Assault_ArtDeco_SR_Crystal.Name: SID_Assault_ArtDeco_SR_Crystal_T05
Schematic:SID_Assault_ArtDeco_SR_Crystal.Description: Assault Weapon: Art Deco.  A versatile assault rifle useful in all types of combat scenarios that is the most accurate when aiming down sights and firing in controlled bursts.

Schematic:SID_Shotgun_ArtDeco_Break_SR_C.Name: SID_Shotgun_ArtDeco_Break_SR_Crystal_T04
Schematic:SID_Shotgun_ArtDeco_Break_SR_C.Description: Shotgun: Art Deco.  Heavy hitting shotgun that deals damage and knockback to multiple enemies in a short, wide cone.  Suffers from a tiny ammo capacity and long reload time.

Schematic:SID_Shotgun_ArtDeco_Break_SR_C.Name: SID_Shotgun_ArtDeco_Break_SR_Crystal_T05
Schematic:SID_Shotgun_ArtDeco_Break_SR_C.Description: Shotgun: Art Deco.  Heavy hitting shotgun that deals damage and knockback to multiple enemies in a short, wide cone.  Suffers from a tiny ammo capacity and long reload time.

Schematic:SID_Sniper_AMR_R_Crystal_T04.Name: SID_Sniper_AMR_R_Crystal_T04
Schematic:SID_Sniper_AMR_R_Crystal_T04.Description: Sniper Rifle: High Tech. Energy rifle that can be fired normally, or can be charged up to fire a single powerful shot that does extreme damage and can pierce through multiple enemies. Deals energy damage which is fairly effective against all elemental enemies.

Schematic:SID_Sniper_AMR_R_Ore_T01.Name: SID_Sniper_AMR_R_Ore_T01
Schematic:SID_Sniper_AMR_R_Ore_T01.Description: Sniper Rifle: High Tech. Energy rifle that can be fired normally, or can be charged up to fire a single powerful shot that does extreme damage and can pierce through multiple enemies. Deals energy damage which is fairly effective against all elemental enemies.

Schematic:SID_Pistol_BoltRevolver_R_Crys.Name: SID_Pistol_BoltRevolver_R_Crystal_T04
Schematic:SID_Pistol_BoltRevolver_R_Crys.Description: Pistol: Bolt Revolver. Fires high-powered bolts that can pierce through multiple enemies. Accurate when fired slowly, and cheap to operate.

Schematic:SID_Pistol_BoltRevolver_R_Ore_.Name: SID_Pistol_BoltRevolver_R_Ore_T01
Schematic:SID_Pistol_BoltRevolver_R_Ore_.Description: Pistol: Bolt Revolver. Fires high-powered bolts that can pierce through multiple enemies. Accurate when fired slowly, and cheap to operate.

Schematic:SID_Edged_Airplane_Axe_SR_Crys.Name: SID_Edged_Airplane_Axe_SR_Crystal_T04
Schematic:SID_Edged_Airplane_Axe_SR_Crys.Description: Axe: Light - Holiday Fun. A light axe with a good balance of damage and impact. Jet-Fueled Blast: Slashes twice and finishes with a thrust that damages and knocks back enemies.
